svg.title: Chipathon workshop slot - pad map with signal lookup
svg.desc: Top-down view of the chipathon-2026 workshop slot die (2935 x 2935 um). 91 I/O cells (60 analog + 20 bidir + 4 DVDD + 4 DVSS + clk_pad + rst_n_pad + inputs[0]) placed on the four edges plus 4 auto corners. Per-pad index numbers (CW from SW) match the four signal-name lookup tables on the right. Bondpad-name convention: analog[i] -> ana(i+1), bidir[i] -> config(i+1).
svg.text: Workshop slot - pad map (91 I/O cells + 4 corners)
2935 x 2935 um die, CW reading order from SW corner; signal lookup tables on the right
chip_core + chip_id + wafer.space logo placed here
PAD_NORTH (22 pads, NE to NW; reversed vs JuanMoya)
PAD_WEST (22 pads, NW to SW; reversed vs JuanMoya)
CW reading from SW corner: each PAD_* list begins at index 1 here

g.text: corner cell (4: gf180mcu_fd_io__cor, auto-placed by LibreLane)

svg.text: Bondpad-name convention: analog[i] -> ana(i+1), bidir[i] -> config(i+1), inputs[0] -> input1
Total: 91 placed I/O cells + 4 corner cells = 95. Source: padring fork librelane/slots/slot_workshop.yaml

g.text: * workshop-mandatory; do not rename or remove
